components.name: glycerol
components.evidence: SMM medium (15 mL) with 10 mM glycerol in 25-mL Reacti Flask closed with screw cap was preincubated at 37 C, growth test was initiated by addition of cells to 0.1 OD600.

components.name: disodium hydrogen phosphate dodecahydrate (Na2HPO4.12H2O)
components.source: cited:Kurumbang 2014 (ref 18); recipe recovered verbatim from Dvorak PhD dissertation (is.muni.cz/th/gyoy9), which reproduces the Kurumbang 2014 Materials & Methods and attributes SMM to Assis 1998 [ref 274]
components.evidence: A synthetic mineral medium (SMM) containing 5.4 g of Na2HPO4.12H2O, 1.4 g of KH2PO4, 0.5 g of (NH4)2SO4, 0.2 g of MgSO4.7H2O, 2 ml of trace elements solution and 1 ml of vitamin B1 (10 g.l-1) per 1 l was used for selection experiments [274].

components.name: potassium dihydrogen phosphate (KH2PO4)
components.source: cited:Kurumbang 2014 (ref 18); recovered from Dvorak PhD dissertation (is.muni.cz/th/gyoy9)
components.evidence: A synthetic mineral medium (SMM) containing 5.4 g of Na2HPO4.12H2O, 1.4 g of KH2PO4, 0.5 g of (NH4)2SO4, 0.2 g of MgSO4.7H2O, 2 ml of trace elements solution and 1 ml of vitamin B1 (10 g.l-1) per 1 l was used for selection experiments [274].

components.name: ammonium sulfate ((NH4)2SO4)
components.source: cited:Kurumbang 2014 (ref 18); recovered from Dvorak PhD dissertation (is.muni.cz/th/gyoy9)
components.evidence: A synthetic mineral medium (SMM) containing 5.4 g of Na2HPO4.12H2O, 1.4 g of KH2PO4, 0.5 g of (NH4)2SO4, 0.2 g of MgSO4.7H2O, 2 ml of trace elements solution and 1 ml of vitamin B1 (10 g.l-1) per 1 l was used for selection experiments [274].

components.name: magnesium sulfate heptahydrate (MgSO4.7H2O)
components.source: cited:Kurumbang 2014 (ref 18); recovered from Dvorak PhD dissertation (is.muni.cz/th/gyoy9)
components.evidence: A synthetic mineral medium (SMM) containing 5.4 g of Na2HPO4.12H2O, 1.4 g of KH2PO4, 0.5 g of (NH4)2SO4, 0.2 g of MgSO4.7H2O, 2 ml of trace elements solution and 1 ml of vitamin B1 (10 g.l-1) per 1 l was used for selection experiments [274].

components.name: thiamine (vitamin B1)
components.concentration: 10 mg/L (1 mL of a 10 g/L stock per L)
components.source: cited:Kurumbang 2014 (ref 18); recovered from Dvorak PhD dissertation (is.muni.cz/th/gyoy9)
components.evidence: ...2 ml of trace elements solution and 1 ml of vitamin B1 (10 g.l-1) per 1 l was used for selection experiments [274].

components.name: trace elements solution (2 mL/L; constituents not stated, unexpanded)
components.source: cited:Kurumbang 2014 (ref 18); recovered from Dvorak PhD dissertation (is.muni.cz/th/gyoy9); composition originates in stock:Assis et al. 1998 (Enzyme Microb. Technol. 22:568-574) which is Elsevier-paywalled (Kent Academic Repository holds metadata only), so the individual trace-metal salts could not be recovered and are NOT invented
components.evidence: A synthetic mineral medium (SMM) containing ... 2 ml of trace elements solution and 1 ml of vitamin B1 (10 g.l-1) per 1 l was used for selection experiments [274]. ... (274) Assis, H. M. S.; Sallis, P. J.; Bull, A. T.; Hardman, D. J. Biochemical Characterization of a Haloalcohol Dehalogenase from Arthrobacter erithii H10a. Enzyme Microb. Technol. 1998, 22, 568-574.

components.name: O2 (aerobic gas phase)
components.evidence: Growth test was performed in shaken flasks (Reacti Flask closed with screw cap) at 37 C using aerobically cultured E. coli BL21(DE3); the organism and cultivation are aerobic.

media.base_medium: SMM (Synthetic Mineral Medium), a defined phosphate-buffered E. coli mineral medium (Na2HPO4/KH2PO4 + (NH4)2SO4 + MgSO4 + trace elements + thiamine), from Kurumbang et al. 2014 (ref 18), originally attributed to Assis et al. 1998 (ref 274).

sources_chased.what: Target paper PMC6921056 main text (defines only 'SMM [18] + 10 mM glycerol', no composition)
Sibling open-access paper Dvorak et al. 2015 Microb. Cell Fact. (PMC4687329, same group/strain/pathway) to test for SMM recipe
added: negative result: that paper uses LB + phosphate buffer, NOT SMM; recipe not there

sources_chased.what: Base recipe cited as ref [18] (Kurumbang et al. 2014, ACS Synth. Biol., DOI 10.1021/sb400147n) - paywalled, not in PMC
sources_chased.how: Recovered verbatim via the compilation PhD dissertation of P. Dvorak (defended 2014, MU Brno) which reproduces the Kurumbang 2014 Materials & Methods; located through theses.cz/id/inya2d and downloaded is.muni.cz/th/gyoy9/Dvorak_dizertace.pdf (cookie-handshake)

sources_chased.what: Trace-elements & vitamin stock composition, cited as ref [274] Assis et al. 1998 (Enzyme Microb. Technol. 22:568-574)
sources_chased.how: Elsevier paywalled; Kent Academic Repository (kar.kent.ac.uk/17553) holds metadata only, no open full text
added: trace elements solution LEFT UNEXPANDED (constituent metal salts not invented)

media.notes: Full SMM bulk-salt recipe recovered from the Kurumbang 2014 (ref 18) Materials & Methods, obtained verbatim from P. Dvorak's compilation PhD dissertation. The four bulk salts, thiamine and glycerol are fully quantified; the 2 mL/L trace-elements solution is left unexpanded because its constituent salts live only in the paywalled Assis 1998 (ref 274) and were not recoverable. Current record was missing Na2HPO4 (the sodium/main phosphate-buffer component) and the trace-elements solution; both are now confirmed real.
